sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n4165" key="a)ligu/glwssos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀλιγύγλωσσος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n4165.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with no clear voice</tr_>, Timo <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
